case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS MORRIS DONALD et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS DONALD
